fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-5 genesis ~1hr ago; fork in ~2hrs; 2 ELs + 4 CLs; Teku onboarding post-fork
bal-devnet-7 is the last BAL-specific devnet; all future EL work merged into Glamsterdam track
glamsterdam-devnet-6 scope: EIP-8246, EIP-7997 (features) + EIP-8038, EIP-2780 (repricing, pending numbers); target ~2 weeks

eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: EIP-8131 + EIP-8279 (data repricing): price 7702 auths, blob version hashes, BAL entries at data floor; 40% worst-case block size reduction
EIP-7979 update: validation algorithm moved on-chain; clients can call it directly without reimplementing; breakout call planned
EIP-8222 (lean staking / privacy pool): two-phase deposit + new withdrawal credential; requires LeanVM; not ready for Hegota
EIP-7851 (permanent EOA delegation via EF02) + EIP-8151 (EC Recover deactivation): full EOA-to-smart-account migration path; positive reception for Hegota

testing_progress.highlight: Other EL clients asked to review engine API changes (execution-apis PR #796) for glamsterdam-devnet-5 onboarding
Next week ACDC call shifted to 11:00 UTC; one-off change, may become regular if Australians attend

action_items.action: EL clients review engine API changes (execution-apis PRs #796, #786) for glamsterdam-devnet-5 onboarding
Schedule EIP-7979 breakout call once draft is merged; coordinate timing with Protocol Support (Josh Davis)

decisions.decision: bal-devnet-7 is the final BAL-specific devnet; no bal-devnet-8; all future work on Glamsterdam devnets
glamsterdam-devnet-6 includes EIP-8246 (self-destruct burn removal), EIP-7997 (deterministic deployer), EIP-8038 + EIP-2780 (repricing with preliminary values); EIP-7610 deferred

PFI for Hegota: EIP-8131 + EIP-8279 (data repricing / block size), EIP-7979 + EIP-8173 (EVM object format / validation), EIP-7851 (permanent EOA delegation), EIP-8151 (EC Recover deactivation); EIP-8222 (lean staking) not targeting Hegota
